iOS APP

Your Personal
Interior Designer

Upload any photo. Extract inspiration from any image. See your room transformed in seconds with the power of AI.

Download on the App Store
★★★★★ Early AccessFirst 3 generations free

How It Works

01

Choose Your Path

Pick from three bespoke options: Text Only, With Inspiration, or Copy a Room

02

Upload & Extract

Upload any image — even a soldier's armor or ice cream — and our AI translates it into design elements

03

Customize

Edit 6 key elements: ceilings, floors, walls, seating, furniture, lighting

04

Generate

See your room redesigned in seconds with stunning photorealistic results
